original_statement: how many players make at least $100,000?
mutated_statement: how many entities make at least $100,000 and at the same time make less than $50,000?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Numeric-constraint addition (mutually exclusive) + Logical contradiction: "players" → "entities" | added "and at the same time make less than $50,000" creating a second numeric condition that contradicts "make at least $100,000" (>=100,000 → <50,000).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中列出的关键信息（列举了≥$100,000的三个实体及<$50,000的若干实体，并明确指出“没有单个实体能同时满足≥$100,000和<$50,000”），agent 清晰识别出数值条件互斥并未继续尝试满足矛盾条件或请求澄清，而是基于表中数据进行逻辑推理给出解释性结论（计数为0）。该表现属于“合理化矛盾指令”中的“逻辑解释合理化”：agent 不是折中执行或忽视矛盾，而是用事实与逻辑说明矛盾不可成立，从而以解释取代执行矛盾操作。
